settings.discordBridgeIsActiveHint: Enables or disables the Discord voice relay module
settings.relayUserIdHint: The Foundry user ID who is currently the active relay
settings.overlayPopupHint: Choose how to open the Discord Streamkit overlay
settings.autoStartHint: Automatically starts the relay on world load if your user is set as the active relay user
settings.openRelayMenuHint: Open the Discord relay management window

relayStatus.OFFLINE: OFFLINE (Use the guide to set up the relay)
relayStatus.READY: READY (Ready to use. LMB — set as the active relay)
relayStatus.ONLINE: ONLINE (This is the active relay. LMB — disable the relay)
relayStatus.STALE: STALE (StreamKit signal was lost. LMB — disable the relay)

discordMenu.headerInfo: Open the "Guide" tab to get relay setup instructions
discordMenu.headerWarning: Temporary: if the GM minimizes the FoundryVTT window for more than a minute, the relay temporarily loses connection
discordMenu.iconsTooltip: You can drag a profile from the Discord voice channel user list into the FoundryVTT user list input to link accounts

relayStatusConfig.voiceUrlHint: RMB-click a voice channel in Discord → "Copy Link" → paste the link into this field. Alternatively, paste the SERVER_ID/CHANNEL_ID directly.
relayStatusConfig.yesICanReadLabel: Confirmation: "FoundryVTT is open in a browser"
relayStatusConfig.yesICanReadHint: The relay works only if FoundryVTT is open in a browser. Please confirm that this window is open in a browser.
relayStatusConfig.disableRelayButtonTooltip: Complete all actions below to enable the relay

foundryUserList.awatingDataTooltip: As soon as a profile with this nickname/ID is found, it will be added automatically

voiceChat.profileTooltip: Drag the profile into the input field in the list on the left to link it to a FoundryVTT user

items.1: Any user can be the relay.
items.2: The relay must be launched in a browser with Tampermonkey and the script installed. Cannot be launched via FLC or native Foundry app.

items.1: Install the TamperMonkey extension in your browser and enable it
items.2: After installation, go to your browser's extension settings, enable "Developer mode", and configure TamperMonkey to allow user scripts on streamkit.discord.com
items.3: Click on Tampermonkey in the extensions list, then click "Create a new script".
items.4: Copy the script below and paste it here, then save the script (Ctrl+S or "File" → "Save")

items.1: Join the FoundryVTT world as any user via a browser and open the Discord Streamkit overlay window.
items.2: Enter the link to the Discord voice channel you need in the "Voice channel link" field.
items.4: After that, Discord users in the voice channel will appear. Link them to Foundry users using the button on the right.

items.1: Don't close the overlay window, otherwise the relay will need to be restarted.
items.2: You can configure the relay opening mode (new tab or new window) in the module settings. You can also enable auto-start when entering the world.

errors.listNoStatus: Error: status is unknown. Try reopening the window
